files.patch:
@@ -27,7 +27,7 @@ jobs:
             ~/.cargo/registry
             ~/.cargo/git
             target
-          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-${{ hashFiles('Cargo.lock') }}
           restore-keys: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-
       - name: Cargo fmt
         run: cargo fmt --check
@@ -50,7 +50,7 @@ jobs:
             ~/.cargo/registry

             target
-          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}
+          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-${{ hashFiles('Cargo.lock') }}
           restore-keys: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-
       - name: Cargo fmt
         run: cargo fmt --check
@@ -76,7 +76,7 @@ jobs:
             ~/.cargo/registry
             ~/.cargo/git
             target
-          key: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-${{ hashFiles('**/Cargo.lock') }}

           restore-keys: ${{ runner.os }}-cargo-
